input.subject: You're Registered: AI in Practice Webinar

input.body_text:
LEARNING PLATFORM

✅ Registration Confirmed!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
AI IN PRACTICE: FROM THEORY TO DEPLOYMENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Date: Tuesday, February 24, 2026
Time: 1:00 PM - 2:30 PM EST
Format: Live Webinar (Zoom)

Presenter: Dr. Maria Santos
           Chief AI Officer, TechCorp

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHAT YOU'LL LEARN:
• Real-world AI implementation strategies
• Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
• Case studies from Fortune 500 companies
• Q&A with the presenter

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

JOIN LINK:
https://zoom.us/j/webinar2026
Meeting ID: 456 789 0123
Passcode: AIWebinar

Add to Calendar: [ICS file attached]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Can't make it live? A recording will be sent within 24 hours.

Questions? Reply to this email.

Happy Learning!
The Learning Platform Team
